song.title: Praise the Lord, God sent His Son
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 c
song.lyrics: [v1] Praise the Lord, God sent His Son! Hallelujah! And salvation’s work was done Glory to God! God Himself became a man So that we might live in Him. [c] That’s why I call on Him, I give my all to Him. [v2] For us He was crucified. Hallelujah! For the many, one Man died. Glory to God! One grain fell into the earth Many grains to bring to birth. [v3] He arose in victory. Hallelujh! From the grave triumphantly Glory to God! Now in resurrection He As the Spirit lives in me. [v4] Call on Him from deep within. Hallelujah! Just by calling He comes in Glory to God! Once you call upon His name, Nevermore you’ll be the same.
